question: Will Jerome Powell be appointed to a third term as Chair of the Federal Reserve?
reason: Jerome Powell's term as Chair ended on May 15, 2026, and Kevin Warsh was confirmed as his successor.
evidence: On May 13, 2026, the U.S. Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the new Federal Reserve Chair, succeeding Jerome Powell. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/business/2026/may/13/kevin-warsh-federal-reserve-chair?utm_source=openai))

On May 15, 2026, the Federal Reserve Board named Powell as chair pro tempore until Warsh is sworn in. ([federalreserve.gov](https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/other20260515a.htm?utm_source=openai))
